creator: wollman@lcs.mit.edu
text:
<<On Mon, 22 Apr 1996 16:44:35 +0700 (NSD), nnd@itfs.nsk.su said:

>> Synopsis:       Configure tunN device for ip-over-ip tunnelling
	
>         The next program can be used to 'solve the problem'.

This functionality would be far better implemented in the kernel.
Indeed, for multicast, it already is.  I implemented something like
this in 386BSD 0.1 about three years ago...

-GAWollman
